mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tokens (user_id, access_token, refresh_token, expiry_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiryDate})

INSERT INTO tokens (user_id, access_token, refresh_token, expiry_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiryDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}
